what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 SVG line icon showing a browser window with simple analytics marks inside it.
observations: The SVG uses a 24 24 viewBox with no fill and currentColor stroke.
A rounded rectangle forms the browser window frame.
A horizontal path separates the browser chrome from the content area.
Two small filled circles represent browser control dots.
A larger circle and an angled polyline-like path depict analytics data or trend movement.
standouts: The icon combines browser chrome with chart-like visual elements in one compact symbol.
Small control dots use currentColor fill while the main geometry uses currentColor stroke.
conventions: Uses inline SVG with xmlns, viewBox, stroke, stroke-width, stroke-linecap, and stroke-linejoin attributes.
Uses simple geometric primitives and paths rather than embedded raster data.
Uses self-contained markup without external references.
concerns: No title or desc metadata is present for standalone accessibility.
notes: This file is a browser analytics icon asset rendered as themeable SVG strokes.
questions: Should this icon include accessible title or description metadata, or is accessibility supplied by the consuming component?
purpose_vs_actual: Filename suggests a browser analytics icon; the SVG content matches by combining a browser window with analytics-style chart marks.
intention_signals: It appears intended to visually represent analytics or reporting within a web browser context as a reusable UI icon.
novelty: The browser frame includes both window controls and two different analytics cues: a circular metric mark and a trend line.
contribution: Contributes a compact, color-inheriting SVG symbol for browser-based analytics that a fused system could keep as an icon asset.
summary_for_embedding: A 24x24 themeable SVG icon depicting a browser window with analytics-style chart elements.
intention_for_embedding: This was for representing browser analytics or web reporting in a design system icon set.
